items.line_en: Hello. Good morning. Good morning, sir. Please take a seat.

coach.say: Hello. Good morning. Good morning, sir. Please take a seat.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Hello. Good morning. / Good morning, sir. Please take a seat.
Chunk it: How can I help you?

items.line_en: Ma'am, I want to open an account in your bank.

coach.say: Ma'am, I want to open an account in your bank.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Ma'am, / I want to open an account in your bank.

items.line_en: Sure, sir. What is your profession?

coach.say: Sure, sir. What is your profession?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Sure, / sir. / What is your profession?

items.line_en: Okay. What is your income source?

coach.say: Okay. What is your income source?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Okay. / What is your income source?

items.line_en: Ma'am, I do part-time job and also get money for a educational purpose from my parents.

coach.say: Ma'am, I do part-time job and also get money for a educational purpose from my parents.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Ma'am, / I do part-time job and also get money for a educational purpose from my parents.

items.line_en: All right. Then you need to open a saving bank account with a minimum opening balance of Rs 500.

coach.say: All right. Then you need to open a saving bank account with a minimum opening balance of Rs 500.
coach.hint: Chunk it: All right. / Then you need to open a saving bank account with a minimum opening balance of Rs 500.

items.line_en: Okay. Ma'am, please let me know the procedure for these.

coach.say: Okay. Ma'am, please let me know the procedure for these.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Okay. / Ma'am, / please let me know the procedure for these.

items.line_en: First, you have to fill up a form and submit it along with necessary documents.

coach.say: First, you have to fill up a form and submit it along with necessary documents.
coach.hint: Chunk it: First, / you have to fill up a form and submit it along with necessary documents.

items.line_en: What are the documents I have to attach with the application form?

coach.say: What are the documents I have to attach with the application form?
coach.hint: Chunk it: What are the documents I have to attach with the application form?

items.line_en: When passport size photo and Xerox of your Adakad will be required.

coach.say: When passport size photo and Xerox of your Adakad will be required.
coach.hint: Chunk it: When passport size photo and / Xerox of your Adakad will be required.

items.line_en: Okay. Ma'am, what else do I need to do?

coach.say: Okay. Ma'am, what else do I need to do?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Okay. / Ma'am, / what else do I need to do?

items.line_en: That is all. Now please go to count in number one and take the form.

coach.say: That is all. Now please go to count in number one and take the form.
coach.hint: Chunk it: That is all. / Now please go to count in number one and take the form.

items.line_en: Thank you for your help, ma'am. You're welcome.

coach.say: Thank you for your help, ma'am. You're welcome.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Thank you for your help, / ma'am. / You're welcome.
